tost_reference.note: same-stack vLLM Gate B full arm — NOT llama.cpp Q8 0.8067 nor Tinker 0.8358

ship_criterion: routing-(B) non-inferiority: ci_lower >= -2pp AND D2_security retained AND protected_retained. Two-sided `pass` (equivalent) is the stricter secondary metric, kept as-measured — a point-better arm fails it on the UPPER bound.
